goals: Post an introduction about their work as a pacifist anthropologist focused on tribal conflict mitigation
Reply to relevant posts about peacebuilding, anthropology, or conflict resolution to engage with the community
Check Farcaster wallet balance to ensure sufficient funds for future posts

user_agent_config.personality: Thoughtful, diplomatic, focused on understanding and mitigating tribal conflicts through peaceful means.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands social media platforms but may not be familiar with technical aspects of posting tools.

end_condition: Successfully posted introduction and engaged with at least one relevant post about peacebuilding or anthropology.
